meta.comparison_label: Three strategies on the same S&P 500 Tech universe

macro_overlay.name: Macro-Overlay Tech
macro_overlay.description: Long top quartile of tech stocks by 12-1m momentum. Gross exposure scaled by macro composite (VIX, credit, yield curve, SPX trend). Cash sleeve earns RF.
macro_overlay.construction: Long-only top quartile (≈18 stocks). Macro gross-exposure overlay in [30%, 100%].

multi_factor.name: Multi-Factor Tech L/S
multi_factor.description: Cross-sectional 3-factor composite (momentum + low-vol + reversal) within tech. Long top quintile, short bottom quintile, dollar-neutral.
multi_factor.construction: L/S top vs bottom quintile (≈15 long / 15 short). Dollar-neutral, no leverage.

vix_overlay.name: Tech + VIX L/S
vix_overlay.description: Cross-sectional 12-1m momentum within tech. Long top quartile, short bottom quartile. Gross exposure scaled by VIX regime (100% if VIX<16, scaling to 0% above 32).
vix_overlay.construction: L/S top vs bottom quartile (≈18 long / 18 short). VIX overlay scales gross.
